Phase-10.NAME: Backend Stability Fixes (P2)
Phase-10.goal: Improve backend code reliability, add migration infrastructure and token security.
Phase-10.step-1: M-001: Replace datetime.utcnow() with timezone-aware values (40+ locations).
Phase-10.step-2: M-028: Initialize Alembic with async support, generate baseline migration.
Phase-10.step-4: M-003: Fix _reprovision_client to remove old WG peer.
Phase-10.step-5: M-008: Fix server.current_clients counter on subscription expiry.
Phase-10.step-8: M-028: Split database.py into database.py + migrations.py.
